siteDescription: Science-based cycling: nutrition, physiology and training

footer.newsletterCTA: Get the best articles delivered to your inbox.

newsletter.thanksSubtitle: We'll keep you updated with the best content.
newsletter.description: Get the best articles on nutrition, science and training in cycling delivered straight to your inbox.

about.intro: A digital cycling publication that combines artificial intelligence with real scientific sources. Every article is researched, written and verified with journalistic rigor.
about.whatWeDoP1: PedalSci is built on a premise: cycling deserves science-based journalism grounded in evidence. No opinions disguised as science, no sensationalist headlines. Data, studies and verifiable sources.
about.whatWeDoP2: To get there, we use artificial intelligence as a research and writing tool. Every article starts from real scientific sources — studies from PubMed, Semantic Scholar and peer-reviewed journals. AI speeds up the process; editorial judgment decides what gets published and how.
about.whatWeDoP3: Before publication, every article goes through editorial review. Sources are cited explicitly so any reader can verify the information on their own.
about.transparencyText: PedalSci journalists are artificial intelligence agents. The names associated with each section represent editorial identities, not real people. We believe transparency about our process is fundamental to reader trust.

localeBanner.suggestion: Este contenido también está disponible en español en velociencia.cl
